programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Stanleys evening at a singles bar ends with a murder and its up to Jonathan and Jennifer to find out who set him up

programme.desc: The detectives do their best to recover a stolen bike stolen from a handicapped girl meanwhile Harvey hires a cleaning lady for Lacey

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When Kates old friend Emily Mapes comes to the Shady Rest she notices that Kate is unmarried and wants to see her wed Emily recruits Kates daughters to round up some bachelors to go to the Shady Rest to court Kate However Uncle Joe thinks that if Kate finds a man he will lose his job

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Beatlemania has hit Hooterville by storm Uncle Joe has recruited Billy Bobbie and Betty Joe along with their friend Sally Ragsdale to form their own band called the Ladybugs An agent is coming to Hooterville to see the girls in action; however Kate will not allow it It is now up to the girls to turn their Mother less square as they put it

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Greg will lie about anything to get a date with a hot girl but when she ends up being everything he has already lied about he must die Then her roommate wants to get ahead at work so is introduced her to a beauty czar who makes her exquisitely lovely which spells her downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Maxs archenemy Siegfried wants to defect

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and while Bobbie Sue nurses him back to health BJ reminisces about the many beautiful women in his past

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Sergeant Schultz impersonates Klink in a scheme to get some of his men free from the Gestapo

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: To get an Italian officer to defect the Heroes use pizza to tempt him

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton finds out that Parker is an old friend of a famous War Correspondent he makes Parker the Base PR Officer in the hope of becoming the subject of the Correspondents next story But Parkers plan to improve The Captains image backfires

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber and the guys concoct a very tall story to try to turn Tinker into a hero so that he can win the heart of his favorite girl But the rumor of Tinkers Secret mission soon spreads throughout the South Pacific and trouble develops when glory-hungry Binghamton tries to get in on the action

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The retirement of the postman convinces Luke and Kate that Grandpa Amos should take it easier It backfires when Grandpa instead works too hard and ends up bedridden

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS tries to blackmail the world when they get an atomic bomb

programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.desc: April Lopez returns as a lounge singer Bud and Margarets kids disrupt their parents second honeymoon with constant needs World War 2 veteran Frank and USO entertainer Eve reunite after thirty-five years

programme.title: WKRP 114
programme.desc: WKRP 114

programme.title: WKRP 213
programme.desc: WKRP 213

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Fredas new love interest turns out to be the new pastor of her church

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Molly wants to go to an exclusive private school

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A headlining talented versatile illusionist and female impersonator is receiving bizarre death threats His manager says hes just over reacting When he reaches out to Dan Tanna for help Dan begins also to get death threats

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: The Harts look forward to lunch with Jennifers friend Marcie and her new spouse Adam Fowler who vanishes and is soon found dead Meanwhile two men who followed him out of the restaurant trail who they think is his wife Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna pressures Dick into being spontaneous but disaster strikes when they take off on a spur-of-the-moment trip

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While Boone is haunted by hallucinations of captain Lucas Johnson the Taelon Rhoha is to undergo a experiment of experiencing human emotions

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: My Science Project
programme.desc: A teen John Stockwell and his girlfriend Danielle von Zerneck raid a military junkyard and find a time-travel contraption from a UFO

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 222
programme.desc: Hercules 222

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelon Commonality is invaded and psychic Katya Petrenko is the prime suspect She tells Boone she knows about his secret activities and needs him

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is blackmailed into slaving for a physician obsessed with curing a deadly strain of meningitis prevalent in a remote Mexican province The fugitive put ashore in Mexico after fleeing US police and swapping places with a departing sailor The expatriate Dr Howell will stop at nothing to wipe out his tiny enemy but Richard Kimble contests the ethics of Howells fanatical methods as a wily local police sergeant closes in on the convicted killer

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne decides to leave a valley engulfed in a ranch war when his boss is bought out He turns down offers from two other ranches but changes his mind when hands from one leave him to die He finds love is part of the problem he faces

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.desc: Two firemen are killed in a warehouse fire one of them Stones friend and he and Keller are drawn into an arson investigation

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Exterminators Of The Year 3000
programme.desc: In the year 3000 the Earth has been rendered a desert by nuclear war A group of survivors goes in search of rare and valuable water but standing in their way are the evil Exterminators who live only to cause pain and misery

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Lion of the Desert

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!

programme.desc: Matt Embree v. Nate Smandych

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: In the series finale, middleweight Kyacey Uscola tries to best his fastest KO (an amazing 5 seconds) when he goes in the ring against the highly skilled South African wrestler, Trevor Prangley.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.desc: Hear the riveting story of a preacher whose promiscuous life almost destroyed him

programme.desc: Meet the man in 1992 who helped to end the Rodney King riots

programme.title: The K Victoria Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Scott and T-Bob find the treasure of Brian Boru at the end of an Irish rainbow but VENOM soon finds out and tries to get it for themselves

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When an archaeologist discovers the remains of the fabled continent of Atlantis Cy-Kill takes advantage of the situation by unleashing a host of ancient demons to destroy the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides turn to the deranged but brilliant Dr Braxis first to destroy the Roguestar and then to save it

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake
